title: Interim Orders - Canada.ca
content:
"The Minister may make an interim order that contains any provision that may be contained in a regulation made under this Act if the Minister believes that immediate action is required to deal with a significant risk, direct or indirect, to health, safety or the environment." Food and Drugs Act
